project.name: Ollie Tests
project.description: Test suite structure for the Ollie JPEG Encoder/Decoder

file.name: runner.js
file.description: Node.js CLI test runner. Imports all test files and displays summary. Includes DOM mocks for UI tests.

file.name: orchestrator.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for higher-level orchestration (Progressive equivalency, Lossless Transcoding Idempotency, Subsampling bounds).

file.name: jpeg-decoder-defensive.test.js
file.description: Tests for defensive validation in the decoder (e.g., catching missing SOI markers).

file.name: jpeg-encoder.test.js
file.description: Integration tests for the JpegEncoder class.

file.name: jpeg-encoder-coefficients.test.js
file.description: Tests for encoding from coefficients (transcoding support).

file.name: jpeg-encoder-quality.test.js
file.description: Tests for quality setting and quantization scaling.

file.name: jpeg-encoder-420.test.js
file.description: Tests for 4:2:0 chroma subsampling encoding.

file.name: jpeg-decoder.test.js
file.description: Integration tests for JpegDecoder. All tests destructure [result, err] tuples. Includes PBT fuzzer for random garbage input (15 iterations), error path tests (SOI, SOF, SOS, DQT, block count), and state reset validation.

file.name: jpeg-transcoder.test.js
file.description: Tests for JpegTranscoder. All tests destructure updateSecret [result, err] tuples. Covers lossless roundtrip, steganography persistence, multi-generation quality, and coefficientsOnly mode.

file.name: steganography.test.js
file.description: Core steganography functionality tests.

file.name: container-format.test.js
file.description: Container format parsing and generation tests.

directory.name: encoder
directory.description: Unit tests for encoder algorithms (all use tuple [result, error] destructuring and PBT)

file.name: blocks.test.js
file.description: Tests for block padding and extraction with tuple returns. PBT: padded >= input, divisible by 8/16. Covers padDimensions420.

file.name: colorspace.test.js
file.description: Tests for RGB/YCbCr conversion with tuple returns. PBT: roundtrip within ±2, grayscale invariant, output range [0,255].

file.name: dct.test.js
file.description: Tests for DCT with tuple returns. PBT: DCT/IDCT roundtrip, AAN-vs-Naive parity. Covers forwardDCTNaive and forwardDCTAAN.

file.name: huffman.test.js
file.description: Tests for Huffman coding with tuple returns. PBT: category symmetry/monotonicity, bit representation range. Covers computeCategory, getBitRepresentation, encodeBlock.

file.name: quantization.test.js
file.description: Tests for quantization with tuple returns. PBT: zero-block invariant, sign preservation. Covers getScaledQuantizationTables (clamping, caching, range).

file.name: zigzag.test.js
file.description: Tests for ZigZag reordering with tuple returns. PBT: roundtrip property, ZIGZAG_ORDER bijection verification.

file.name: downsampling.test.js
file.description: Tests for chroma downsampling with tuple returns. PBT: uniform input invariant. Covers downsampleBlock420 and extractLumaBlocks420.

file.name: spiff-generation.test.js
file.description: Tests for SPIFF APP8 marker generation.

file.name: progressive-encoding.test.js
file.description: Tests for Progressive JPEG encoding (multi-scan).

directory.name: decoder
directory.description: Unit tests for decoder algorithms (all use tuple [result, error] destructuring)

file.name: quantization-parser.test.js
file.description: Tests for DQT segment parsing with tuple returns and error propagation.

file.name: huffman-parser.test.js
file.description: Tests for DHT segment parsing with tuple returns. Includes multi-table and error validation.

file.name: huffman-decoder.test.js
file.description: Tests for Huffman entropy decoding with tuple returns (decodeDC, decodeAC, decodeBlock).

file.name: frame-parser.test.js
file.description: Tests for SOF0 frame header parsing with tuple returns and error validation.

file.name: scan-parser.test.js
file.description: Tests for SOS scan header parsing with tuple returns.

file.name: spiff-parsing.test.js
file.description: Integration tests for SPIFF APP8 marker parsing (via JpegDecoder).

file.name: progressive-decoding.test.js
file.description: Tests for Progressive JPEG decoding.

file.name: inverse-zigzag.test.js
file.description: Tests for inverse zigzag reordering with tuple returns. Includes PBT bijection property.

file.name: dequantization.test.js
file.description: Tests for dequantization with tuple returns and error validation.

file.name: idct.test.js
file.description: Tests for IDCT with tuple returns. Includes PBT DC-only and random roundtrip properties.

file.name: idct-spec.test.js
file.description: Tests for IDCT spec implementations with tuple returns and validation.

file.name: idct-switching.test.js
file.description: Tests for runtime IDCT method switching (spy returns tuple).

file.name: colorspace-decoder.test.js
file.description: Tests for YCbCr to RGB conversion.

file.name: upsampling.test.js
file.description: Tests for chroma upsampling.

file.name: block-assembly.test.js
file.description: Tests for block assembly.

file.name: container.test.js
file.description: Tests for steganography container format.

file.name: chunk-manager.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for data chunking and reassembly (symmetry, shuffle recovery, tamper rejection).

file.name: f5.test.js
file.description: Tests for F5 steganography algorithm implementation.

file.name: batch-process.test.js
file.description: Tests for batch embed/extract roundtrip. Destructures [result, err] tuples from BatchEmbedder.embed and BatchExtractor.extract.

file.name: error-correction.test.js
file.description: Tests for ErrorCorrection wrapper (ECC profiles, multi-block chunking, corruption recovery, interleaving).

file.name: galois-field.test.js
file.description: PBT for GF(256) arithmetic: addOrSubtract (identity, self-inverse, commutativity, associativity), multiply (identity, zero, commutativity), inverse (a*inv(a)==1, involution), distributive law, polynomial operations (evaluateAt, add, multiply, divide). 100+ PBT iterations per property.

file.name: reed-solomon.test.js
file.description: Direct RS encoder/decoder tests: systematic encoding, PBT encode/decode roundtrip with t-error recovery (30 iterations), single-error sweep, cross-field testing, generator caching.

file.name: reed-solomon-integration.test.js
file.description: ErrorCorrection wrapper tests with tuple returns: profile-based protect/recover, PBT roundtrip (30 iterations), all-profiles sweep, overhead multiplier validation, legacy path.

file.name: encryption.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for AES-GCM: symmetry, key rejection, tamper resistance (50+ iterations each).

file.name: key-derivation.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for PBKDF2: deterministic derivation, salt influence, uniqueness (100+ iterations).

file.name: secure-entry.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for SecureEntry: structural immutability, encryption round-tripping, explicit error returns on wrong key.

file.name: vault-manager.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests for PasswordVault: idempotent serialization, immutable accumulation, lock determinism, schema rejection (25+ iterations, up to 1250 mutations).

file.name: vault-e2e.test.js
file.description: Comprehensive End-to-End Steganography PBT for the Vault: simulates full save-to-files and load-from-files cycle using wild-type image fixtures to verify batch chunking, ECC, and Huffman encoding parity.

file.name: vault-e2e-crud.test.js
file.description: E2E survival test for Vault CRUD operations (add/update/delete) through a full JPEG steganography roundtrip.

file.name: vault-e2e-carriers.test.js
file.description: Ensures F5 steganography E2E roundtrips succeed across Baseline (4:4:4), Progressive, and Subsampled (4:2:0) JPEG carrier images.

file.name: vault-e2e-crypto-boundary.test.js
file.description: Cryptographic boundary E2E test enforcing [null, Error] tuple returns when extracting with an incorrect master password.

file.name: vault-e2e-ecc.test.js
file.description: Targeted AC coefficient corruption E2E test to guarantee Reed-Solomon Error Correction recovers data from a live JPEG correctly.

file.name: vault-e2e-empty.test.js
file.description: Boundary tests for saving/loading empty vaults and for BatchEmbedder deterministic rejection of oversized data into tiny capacity images.

file.name: vault-e2e-multigen.test.js
file.description: Tests multi-generation overwrites to verify the JpegTranscoder successfully overwrites previously embedded F5 steganography.

file.name: test-runner.js
file.description: Unified test runner: describe/it/expect with per-test assertion counting, structured result objects, zero-assertion warnings, and pluggable onTestComplete hook. Works in both Node.js and browser.

function.name: describe
function.description: Defines a test suite. Awaits async fn in both Node and browser.

function.name: it
function.description: Defines a test case. Records structured result with status, duration, assertion count.

function.name: expect
function.description: Assertion matcher factory. Each matcher call increments per-test assertion counter.
function.class: <method name="toBeLessThan" params="expected" description="Asserts actual < expected." /> <method name="toBeLessThanOrEqual" params="expected" description="Asserts actual <= expected." />

function.name: onTestComplete
function.description: Sets callback invoked after each test with structured result object.

function.name: getTestResults
function.description: Returns array of structured test results from current run.

function.name: resetStats
function.description: Resets test statistics, results array, and assertion counter.

file.name: pbt.js
file.description: Property-Based Testing harness with counterexample shrinking. Generators return {generate(), shrink(value)}. assertProperty auto-shrinks failures to minimal counterexample (up to 50 rounds).

file.name: coverage.js
file.description: Lightweight opt-in coverage tracker. Modules call coverage.hit() at function entry. Reports per-module/function hit counts. Scaffold for mutation testing.

file.name: block-assembly.test.js
file.description: Tests for assembling 8x8 blocks into final image channels.

file.name: progressive-decoding.test.js
file.description: Tests for decoding progressive JPEGs.

file.name: rst-markers.test.js
file.description: Property-based tests ensuring robust decoding capability across arbitrary Restart Intervals.

file.name: spiff-parsing.test.js
file.description: Tests for parsing SPIFF application markers.

file.name: reedsolomon.test.js
file.description: Tests for Reed-Solomon codec implementation.

directory.name: fixtures
directory.description: Test JPEG files for decoder testing

file.name: generate-fixtures.js
file.description: Script to generate test JPEG files using the encoder.

file.name: README.md
file.description: Documentation for test fixtures.

file.name: roundtrip.test.js
file.description: Encoder-decoder roundtrip tests. All decode calls destructure [result, err] tuples. Covers solid colors, gradients, quality settings, alpha.

file.name: steganography-roundtrip.test.js
file.description: Steganography embed/extract roundtrip tests. Decode calls destructure [result, err] tuples.

file.name: auto_detection_roundtrip.test.js
file.description: Tests for automatic format detection in roundtrip scenarios.

file.name: capacity_validation.test.js
file.description: Tests for steganography capacity calculation and validation.

file.name: format_detection.test.js
file.description: Tests for JPEG format detection and classification.

directory.name: debug
directory.description: Debug and diagnostic scripts (not part of automated test suite)

file.name: bench_huffman.js
file.description: Huffman coding benchmarking script.

file.name: debug-aan.js
file.description: AAN IDCT debugging and analysis script.

file.name: debug-artifacts.md
file.description: Notes on debug artifacts and findings.

file.name: test-jsteg-debug.js
file.description: Jsteg steganography debugging script.

file.name: test-roundtrip-debug.js
file.description: Roundtrip encoding/decoding debugging script.

file.name: verify-fixes.js
file.description: Verification script for bug fixes.

file.name: quick-test.js
file.description: Quick test runner for rapid iteration.

rules.rule: Test lists in test.html and test/runner.js must always be identical to maintain environment coverage parity.
Tests must use Property-Based Testing (PBT) for core algorithmic integrity and edge cases.
Every assertion must exhibit Mutation-Killing Assertion Strength — validating specific structural values rather than just non-failure.
PBT Generators must be explicitly bounded to respect the mathematical and physical capacity limits being tested.
